next_steps: Perform image-guided core needle biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft-tissue mass for histopathology and immunohistochemical staining
Perform PET/CT scan to assess total body extent of inflammatory or neoplastic involvement
Initiate high-dose glucocorticoid therapy as diagnostic and therapeutic trial for suspected IgG4-RD
Consult cardiothoracic surgery for consideration of pericardial biopsy if imaging/serology is inconclusive
